hero.heading: Work schedules in minutes, not hours
hero.description: Simplify shift management in your pharmacy, clinic, restaurant or hotel. Automatic, fair and legally compliant schedules.

appPreview.heading: From chaos to control
appPreview.description: Stop wasting 4 hours a week creating schedules manually. Shiftera creates automatic schedules respecting your team's preferences, skills and legal compliance.
appPreview.bullet2: Synced with your team's mobile phone

features.heading: Everything you need to manage schedules
features.description: Features designed for pharmacies, clinics, restaurants and hotels in Portugal.
features.automaticSchedulesDesc: Create weekly schedules with reusable templates. Adjust shifts with drag-and-drop.
features.teamManagementDesc: Employee profiles, roles, availability and swap requests — all in one place.
features.swapsTimeOffDesc: Employees request swaps and time off directly in the app. You approve with one click.
features.fairnessAnalyticsDesc: Fair distribution of shifts, weekends and holidays. Visual dashboards to track.
features.complianceDesc: Automatic validations for Portuguese labor law: rest periods, hour limits, holidays.
features.exportDesc: Export schedules as PDF to post or as Excel for records. Reports ready for inspection.

howItWorks.heading: 3 simple steps to get started
howItWorks.step1Desc: Import employees, set skills, shifts and preferences. Takes 10 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Define coverage needs, mandatory shifts and legal restrictions. Once and you're done.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Click a button. Shiftera creates automatic schedules. Approve and share with your team.

testimonials.heading: What our customers say
testimonials.t1Quote: Shiftera reduced the time we spent creating schedules from 4 hours to 20 minutes. The whole team is grateful.
testimonials.t2Quote: Finally I can see all doctors' availability in one place. Shift swaps are no longer a nightmare.
testimonials.t3Quote: With the high turnover we have in food service, Shiftera is essential. I set up shifts in minutes and the team gets everything on their phone.
testimonials.t4Quote: Managing schedules for reception, housekeeping and F&B in a hotel is complex. Shiftera simplified everything with a single view.

pricing.heading: Simple and transparent
pricing.description: One plan. No surprises. Pay only for what you use.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Yes! The trial lasts 14 days and needs no credit card. Cancel anytime.
faq.q2: Does it work for pharmacies and clinics?
faq.a2: Yes, Shiftera was designed specifically for pharmacies, clinics, labs and practices in Portugal.
faq.q3: Is it compliant with labor law?
faq.a3: Yes. We automatically validate rest periods, weekly hour limits and mandatory holidays.
faq.a4: Yes, export as PDF to post in-store or Excel for records and reports.
faq.a5: $19 base + (5 × $2) = $29/month. The 14-day trial is completely free.

finalCta.heading: Ready to simplify your schedules?
finalCta.description: Join 500+ companies already saving time and creating fairer schedules.
